snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 02 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 19th Feb 21
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 02 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 19th Feb 21

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.

Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-struck souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?

Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

Cast :

Iqra Aziz As Mahi
Feroz Khan As Farhad
Rubina Ashraf As Bari Sarkar
Hina Bayat As Maa Ji
Junaid Khan As Sikandar
Mirza Zain Baig As Taimoor
Usman Peerzada As Kazim
Javed Shaikh As Nisar
Seemi Pasha As Nisar’s Wife
Asma Abbas As Farhad’s Mother
Waseem Abbas As Taufeeq Ahmed
Sunita Marshal As Sahiba
Tooba Siddique As Romana
Sohail Sameer As Nazim
Meherbano As Rida
Shameen Khan As Sajjal

#HappilacPaints 
#Colors0fHappiness
#HappilacWipeout

snippet.title: Lut Gaye (Full Song) Emraan Hashmi, Yukti | Jubin N, Tanishk B, Manoj M | Bhushan K | Radhika-Vinay
snippet.description:
Gulshan Kumar & T-Series presents Bhushan Kumar's Lut Gaye; a romantic ballad composed by Tanishk Bagchi, penned by Manoj Muntashir and sung by Jubin Nautiyal featuring Emraan Hashmi, and Yukti Thareja. The video is directed by Radhika Rao and Vinay Sapru.

♪Stream the Full Song Here♪

snippet.title: Groove Mera | HBL PSL Official Anthem 2021 | Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig & Young Stunners | #HBLPSL6
snippet.description:
Groove Mera | HBL PSL Official Anthem 2021 | Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig & Young Stunners | #HBLPSL6

Groove with us to the official HBL PSL 6 anthem as we celebrate the moments of finesse that one finds in the heart of every cricket match. 

This year’s anthem also reflects the realities of COVID-19. As a number of fans will be watching Pakistan’s biggest sporting event remotely, the anthem cheers on players on the field and their fans at home to celebrate their groove!

The anthem is a celebration of Pakistan’s musical diversity as Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig and Young Stunners come together to sing the HBL PSL anthem for the first time ever. The mix of artists is particularly exciting as it represents artists from opposite ends of Pakistan’s musical spectrum. The anthem brings together voices from Pakistan’s rich musical landscape: regional folk and urban sounds of pop and hip-hop.

Music Produced by Xulfi
Agency: Giraffe Pakistan
Composed by Xulfi and Adnan Dhool
Lyrics: Adnan Dhool, Young Stunners (Talha Younus, Talha Anjum)
Associate Music Producer: Bilal Haider
Executive Producer: Muhammad Ibrahim
Operations Manager: Saad Mansoor
Vocals: Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig, Young Stunners 
Recorded and Mixed by Xulfi @ Xth Harmonic
Mastered by Chris Gehringer @ Sterling Sound, Edgewater NJ.
Production House: Seeme Production 
Executive Producer: Shehzad Ahmed 
Producer: Madiha Majeed 
Director: Fida Moin
DOP: Zain Haleem 
Post Producer: Faisal Shaikh 
Edit: Ahsan Raza 
Grade: Tahir Moosa 
Post and animation: Owais Roy, Post Island

#HBLPSL6 #PSL #Cricket
Pakistan Super League is a franchise T20 cricket tournament organized by the Pakistan Cricket Board. Top international and local cricketers represent five cities of Pakistan.

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 03 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 26th Feb 21
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 03 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 26th Feb 21

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.

Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-struck souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?

Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher

یاد مصلے پہ علیؑ آگئے جونہی

snippet.title: Gangubai Kathiawadi | Official Teaser | Sanjay Leela Bhansali, Alia Bhatt | 30th July 2021
snippet.description:
Gangubai Kathiawadi - A story, based on the book “ Mafia Queens of Mumbai” written by  S. Hussain Zaidi, is a film that celebrates the rise of a simple girl from Kathiawad who had no choice but to embrace the ways of destiny and swing it in her favour.

The narrative walks through the life of young Ganga who in no time marks her own territory and becomes Gangubai – The Matriarch of Kamathipura.

Once again, Sanjay Leela Bhansali brings to his audience a moving yet stem-winding story with power-packed performances laced in his magical musical notes.
With a promise to make one and all feel inspired in 2021 as Gangubai Kathiawadi celebrates the journey of a girl who became the voice for women empowerment.

Bhansali Productions & PEN Studios  Present
A Film by Sanjay Leela Bhansali
Produced by: Sanjay Leela Bhansali & Dr. Jayantilal Gada (Pen Studios)

In Cinemas: July 30, 2021

●● MANQABAT LYRICS ● ● 


●Jo Ali Tak Na Pohnche Who Kahan Jaye Aur Kis Tak Pohnche?
Khuda Ki Qasam Ali Tak Pohncna Wala Hi Khuda Tak Pohncta Hai
Ali Arsh Ala Kay Mehwaro Markaz Hain

●Hamari Takhleeq Ki Wajah Hai
Ali Na Khuda Hain Na Bashar Hai Aur Na Hi Farishta
Balke Abad Tak EkRaaz Hai Aur Moama Hain
Ali Abu Turaab Aur AbulHasan Hain
Khuda Ne Mairay Dil Par Ali Likh Diya Hai
Yaqeenan  Ali Hi Mairay Ameer Hain
Ya Ali Is Kainaat Ki Wajah ETakhleek Ap Hain
Zameen ParRehtain Huwe Bhi Asmano Ko Rizq Daine Wale Hain Ap
Shio n Ki  Izzat Wa Sarbulandi Ki Wajah Ap Hai
Ap KaNaa Azaan KiRooh Aur Rukn Hai
Ap Kay Ilawa Koi Dusra Fatiha KhyberNahi Hai
Ali Ya Ali Haider Haider

●Bad r o Khandaq Ka Fatihe Ali Hain
Khuda Ki Qudrat Mutlaq Ali Hain
Fatima Nay Dushmano Kay Samne Kahan
Ali Haq Hai n Ali Haq Hain
Ya Ali Deen Kay Asl Hadaf Hain
Ya Ali Kaabe Kay Liye Sharaf Hain
Shehanshah e Najaf Ap Hain
Ap Kay Siwa Koi Saqie Kausar Nahi Tha
Ap Kay IlawaKoi Khyber Ka Shar Nahi Tha
Ap Kay Bagair Jis Se Behtar Koi Aur Nahi Tha
Ap Kay Siwa Paighambar Ka Koi Jansheen Nahi Tha
Aur Bas Ap Hi Sahib e Mimbar Hain
Ali Ya Ali Haider Haider

●Mehraam Raaz e Yazdaan Ali
Ayatain Keh Rahi Hai Dam Ba Dam
Nuqta e Baye Quran Ali
Kaha Ali Ali Suna 
Dawa Ali Shifa Ali
Ata Ali Jaza Ali 
Sada Ati Hai Daar Se Dam Ba Dam
Ali Ko Na Chorain Gain Rab Ki Qasam
Kate YeZabaan Chahe Sar Se Ho Qalam
Hatain Gain Na Peeche Kabhi Bhi Qadam
Ali Wala Bola Yeh ZaireKhanjer
Ali Ya Ali Haider Haider

●Ayat Kibriya Bas Ali
Zeenat Mustafa Bas Ali
AzmateKibriya Bas Ali
Izzat Fatima Hai Bas Ali 
Kalam Haq Zabane Haq
SirateHaqNishane Rab Ali
Sadaye Rab Azaan Rab Ali
Sonu SonuSonu Yeh Qole Nabi
Ali Kay Dost Say Hai Khuda Ki Dosti
Abuturaab Se RakheGa Jo Bhi Dushmani
KhudaNeKehDiya Who Lanti Hai Lanti
Yeh Jhoom Jhoom Kay Khum Main Bole Qambar
Ali Ya Ali Haider Haider

●Waris Ambiya Murtaza
Adam e Nooh Ka Paishwa
Jalwa e Toor Ki Roshni
Khizr o Ilyaam Ka Rehnuma
Dua Ali Asar Ali Ali
Asa Ali Hunar Ali Ali
Fiza Ali Qadar Ali Ali
Masiha Ka Bhi Hai Masiha Ali
Zabih e Khuda Ki Yahi Zindagi
Khalil Khuda HO Kay Musa Nabhi
Ali Apne Ajdad Ka Bhi Ali
Takallum Kaha Nabiyon Ne Aksar
Ali Ya Ali Haider Haider

JULMI BADI AUKAT PE YE RAAT AAYI HAIMANN TO HAI MERA PAWANMAGAR 
YOVAN HARJAI HAIO kAISE HO MILAN BAANKE PIYA SE JAAN MERI ATKI

BAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIBAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIBAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KI

PANGHATPE GAT GAT KARKE PEETI REHTI PEETI REHTISAWARIYA BIN SAJNA KE JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTIPANGHATPE GAT GAT KARKE PEETI REHTI PEETI REHTISAWARIYA BIN SAJNA KE JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTI

(RAP)PATATI PATAH PATAANTIKYU TU ITNA BANTIGHANA ATTITUDE GHAMANDIPAR BANEGI TU MERI BANDIKYUKI NAZAROON MAI JABSE TU AATKI ATKIBHUDDHI HAI MERI THODI SATKI SATKIKAMARIYA TERI MATKI MATKIDIL KARE FOOD DOON MAI FATAKI FATAKI PAR

(ANTRA)

snippet.title: Mission Valentine | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Download the OctaFX Trading App at https://bit.ly/Chanchlani_OctaFX and get 5000 USD in your demo account 💵. Start making extra money with the "Best Forex Broker in India 2020" - OctaFX🏆📈

Aa gaya humara naya video
MISSION VALENTINE!
PURA VIDEO END TAK DEKHNA
Warna maza nai aaega
Bahut time baad tum sab seth logo ke lie ek one story video banayi
Haan maalum hai tum sabko laga 3rd part aaega valentine ka 
Lekin dekha humne kaise usko tease kiya video mein😉
Acha sachi bolta hu is video ke peeche 1 mahina lag gaya,from scripting to editing islie itna delay ho gaya video
Maafi seth log.
But maza aa gaya
Ye descrption main aaj subah ke 6 baje hagte hue likh raha hu socho kitni fatt gayi😂
Wo sab chodho ye humara pehla video hai jisme humne first time ek naye aspect ko introduce kiya aur normalize kiya
(Lekin DOKHA paap hai saalo yaad rakhna)
Abhi suno kasam se kehta hu is baar puri ki puri editing maine ki
Is baar video mein puri ki puri ACV team hai
Except Anmol
Except Grishim
Except Muski
Okay lol..
Is video mein kaafi naye chehre bhi dekhne mile honge jinhone bahut amazing performance diya
Introducing ACV team mein Bhavika Motwani as kaam-waali didi
Super talented Vivek Menon (@Watermenon Pictures ) apne beyounick ki team se (teesra hawaldar after kunal & tushar😂)
Aur to aur wo hotel waali ladki jo bhaag gayi Ritika bajaj
Baaki sab purane chawal hai ACV team ke likhte likhte thak jaunga
@Akash Dodeja as mc dost
@Kunal Chhabhria  as lavaris baap
@Simran Dhanwani meri valentine 
Manvita Chhabhria (kunal ki real life biwi aur meri reel life mummy)
@Rohit Sadhwani  as harami manager
@Ritesh Sadhwani  wo paneer-dudh waala 
@Tanish Sirwani  wo dank hotel guest
@Jashan Sirwani  wo hotel waala jo mam ke saath aaya tha
Akash jagtap wo acha desh ka nagrik jo buzurko ki madad karta hai (dont judge a book by its cover)
@Paras Rupani  as bhagoda boyfriend
Animesh Makhija wo nanga dodta hua guest (bhai ki body achi thi toh nanga scene kiya apne liye🙌🏻)
Karan dhanwani rota hua aashiq (dhyaan se dekhna)
Camera @Siddharth Kedare  urf cinderella ne sambhala (shoot khatam hote hi bhaag jaata hai saala)
Lights aur production sirwani brothers ( mere mama ke ladke, aaj kal 50 r lete hai din ka)
Sound handling by ritesh wohi dudh waala
Ladka acha hai but jokes gande maarta hai
Wo hotel couple of wala scene ka idea was idea by Ashi chawla (idea ache deta hai par shooting se darta hai)
Baaki script writing & direction by your chanchu❤️
Seth log agar ye video pasand aayi toh please
Like chodh ke jaana
Mast comment karna favorite scene aur video apne committed (if they exist) as well as single ( matlab sab log😂)
ke saath share karna
Baaki toh tum seth log ko  maalum hai tumhara ashu tum acvians se kitna pyaar karta hai😘
#AshishChanchlani #MissionValentine #Acvians

Aa gaya humara naya video
MISSION VALENTINE!
PURA VIDEO END TAK DEKHNA

Abhi suno kasam se kehta hu is baar puri ki puri editing maine ki
Is baar video mein puri ki puri ACV team hai

snippet.description:

Likht meri de vich sift teri
Sift teri te ai grift meri

Mere Dil vich ik Ghar hai tera
Tere ghar kol aakе bus rukgi
Samjhi na ethe meri gall mukkgi
Jithе mukki otho' challugi repeat te
Ni teri haa' - naa da fark ni penda dheeth te
Bus vich bethi sajji teeji seat te
Geet mera challe teri heartbeat te....

Dhupp jado' tere chehre utte bethdi
Chehra tera janda meri rooh ch bethda
Rooh meri bethi tereya' khyala' ch
Tera ta' vajood lgge khooh ch bethda
Khooh ton bahar aaja jaane meriye
Aaja daryava' di krava' sair ni
Drya ton ocean da raah puchh k
Galla' kr beach te dubo k pair ni
Pair tere chhoon giya' lehra' aan k

Gall uljhake aape hall krange

snippet.title: Kosovo: Newest Independent Islamic Country in Europe, India's reaction on declaration | Najam Bajwa
snippet.description:
Kosovo: Marks 13th Independence Day, A New European Nation-State? The most youngest Islamic country in the world. Serbia continues to see Kosovo as its own territory, despite recognition of its independence by over 117 countries. Kosovo is a Newest Independent Islamic Country in Europe. India's reaction on declaration India's reaction to the 2008 Kosovo declaration of independence. Understand with Maps explanation by Najam Ul Hassan Bajwa.
#Kosovo

snippet.title: MAZAA | B Praak | Jaani | Arvindr K | New Hindi Songs 2021 |Gurmeet | Hansika | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
"There is no love without forgiveness and there is no forgiveness without love"

"Mazaa" is a song about confession, love, betrayal, regret, and forgiveness from beloved... 

Saregama Originals Presents "Mazaa" in the voice of "B Praak" featuring Gurmeet Choudhary and Hansika Motwani. The song is composed by "B Praak", lyrics penned by Jaani and directed by Arvindr Khaira.

Audio Credits:
Singer& Music By: B Praak
Lyricist & Composer: Jaani 
Video: Arvinder Khaira 
Presentation by: Dilraj Nandha 

Team:- 
Creative director:- Amrinder Singh 
Music Themes Designed By B Praak
Arranged&Programmed By Kartik dev Gaurav Dev 
Flute By Paras Nath
Violin By Manas 
Mix&Mastered By Gurjinder&Akash
B Praak Costume by: Mayurkataria
Assistant Director: Satnam Singh, Jais Sivia, Sukhman Singh
Production by: Third eye films (Faheem Rahiman) Dubai

Hansika Motwani Team:  
Hairstylist: Savita Dnyanoba Sankpal 
Makeup Artist: Reshma Merchant 
Costume: Pranab Sood
BTS team: Paul Davidson 

Gurmeet Choudhary Team
Makeup: Sangeeta Rawal 
Makeup Assitant: Rasika Shinde 
Hair: Asir Sayeed (team HAKIM AALIM )
Costume: Yash Badheka
Manager: Vasudha Grover ( TOABH ENTERTAINMENT)
Driver: Pintu Yaadav 
Personal assistant: Pintu yaadav


Line production - Vikrant kaushik, Adesh Gola, Arun Paharia 
Mumbai Production - Anuj Tiwari
Digital Partner - Coin Digital 

#BPraak
#Mazaa
#Jaani 
#ArvindrKhaira 
#SaregamaMusic

Lyrics:
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon Ki Baho Mein So ke, Sach batayein Mazza aa gaya,
Tu Tu Hai Meri Jaan koi tujh sa koi na, yeh unki jo Khushboo samjha gaya…
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon ki Bahi Mein So Ke – 2
Bhatak gaye the hum Ek Shaam ko, kiya hai kharaab kharaab tere naam ko
Kyun Dil Teda Todha yeh poochne humse sapne mein mere khuda aaya…

Dariya Yeh Dariya Dariya Na Hota , Na Hota Jo Iska Kinara
Aqal Thikane aayi hamari tumse bichad kar o yaara – 2
Raat ko Nikla tha teri gali se, thokar main kha kar subah aa gaya
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon Ki Bahi Mein, Sach Sach batayein Mazza aa gaya,
Tu Tu Hai Meri Jaan koi tujh sa koi na, yeh unki jo Khushboo samjha gaya…

Yeh Ghalti Thi Akhari Mauka de de na mujh ko tu Saaki,
Ab tere pairon mein kaatnge jitni bhi zindagi hai baaki – 2
Jaani ke andar jo Jaani Awaara tha Jaani who khud hi Jala aa gaya
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon Ki Bahi Mein, Sach Sach batayein Mazza aa gaya,
Tu Tu Hai Meri Jaan koi tujh sa koi na, yeh unki jo Khushboo samjha gaya…

Also, listen to the song on:

JioSaavn: http://bit.ly/37EnmVG
Wynk: https://wynk.in/u/t8jBiqRa2
Spotify: http://spoti.fi/2P4qXWA
Hungama: http://bit.ly/3uq0pPx
Amazon Prime Music: https://amzn.to/37EnN2g

Sira e hou
Sira e hou
Sira e hou

Desi Crew… Desi Crew… Desi Crew… Desi Crew…

Mukhde to pauga bhlekha chann da
Jani khani utte nahio dil mannda
Mukhde to pauga bhlekha chann da
Jani khani utte nahio dil mannda

Ho paugi kahrood jo
Jatti ni barood jo
Nira e hou nira e hou

Ho turru jehdi taur ni
Patt dungi shor ni
Chhada ju 12 bor ni
Ho sira e hou sira e hou
Jatti sira e hou

Ho paune 6 k foot jatta meri height ve
Methon puchhan saheliyan jo lawaan diet ve
Main vi bahuteyan friend’a ch believe naa karan
Mere pichhe chobbran ch hundi fight ve

Jo khadu mere pakh ch
Garoor jihdi akh ch
Nira e hou nira e hou

Main vekhun mud mud ke
Rahun naal jud ke
Te paaun chitte kurte
Sira e hou sira e hou
Jatt sira e hou

Ho maahdi moti gall nahio jaan vaardi
Ho gaya main talli phadu chabi car di
Limit ni kardi cross kade oh
Family joint hou meri naar di

Ho kahi ni main mod’da
Dil ni main tod’da
Pikka lai doon Ford da
Sira e hou sira e hou

Ho goneaane aaugi
Vekhi kivein chhaugi
Suit jadon paaugi
Sira e hou ohdon sira e hou

Suit karaan order maim online ve
Akh nakk lakk mere tinne fine ve
Surajan naan mera kithe aa mukabala
Mukh mera eddan karda ae shine ve

Ho paina jadon hass main
10 bata 10 main
Sira e hou sira e hou

Maana tere naal ve
Zindagi kamaal ve
Ghair dena thaal ve
Sira e hou sira e hou
Utton sira e hou

Ho poora maan taan oh deyun Maan nu
Khad ke Bhatinda dekhuga rakaan nu
Jehde mere yaar mainu rehn chhed’de
Den’ge wadhaiyan gabbru jawan nu

Hmm dohein same same ji
Jatti naale mem ji
Pau jehdi game ji
Sira e hou sira he hou

Ho pakki laa doon mohar jo
Sulfe di lor jo
Gussa deyu thor jo
Sira e hou sira e hou
Jatti sira e hou

Mere naal khad ke
Zindagi se varke
Naal naal padh ke
Sira e hou jatta sira e hou

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Episode 02 Teaser - 12th February 2021 - HAR PAL GEO
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Episode 02 Teaser - 12th February 2021 - HAR PAL GEO

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-struck souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

Cast :
Iqra Aziz As Mahi
Feroz Khan As Farhad
Rubina Ashraf As Bari Sarkar
Hina Bayat As Maa Ji
Junaid Khan As Sikandar
Mirza Zain Baig As Taimoor
Usman Peerzada As Kazim
Javed Shaikh As Nisar
Seemi Pasha As Nisar’s Wife
Asma Abbas As Farhad’s Mother
Waseem Abbas As Taufeeq Ahmed
Sunita Marshal As Sahiba

localized.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Episode 02 Teaser - 12th February 2021 - HAR PAL GEO
localized.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Episode 02 Teaser - 12th February 2021 - HAR PAL GEO

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-struck souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment

snippet.title: Kaka | Dhund Di Khushboo  ▶ਧੁੰਦ ਦੀ ਖੁਸ਼ਬੂ | Adaab Kharoud | Official Video | New Punjabi Song 2021
snippet.description:
They say, “Love is in the air”... It’s time to experience the notion with “Dhund Di Khushboo”❤️
Bringing to you one more melody by your favorite Kaka Ji🎶. 

Song Credits: 
Song: Dhund Di Khushboo
Artist: Kaka, Adaab kharoud
Music Composer and Lyricist: Kaka 
Music Director: Gavin Beats
Video Director: Sukh D
Project conceived and managed by - scope entertainment (https://instagram.com/scope.entertainment?igshid=1l8hzgstsktao)
Casting agency: Medazenith Makers
Photography: Farmer sons
Directed by: Sukh D(instagram.com/iamsukhd)
Special Thanks:  Kimberly The boarding school
Official Radio Partner - 94.3 (MY FM)
Digital Partner - Coin Digital 


#SaregamaMusic​
#Kaka​
#DhundDiKhushboo

Lyrics: 
Dhundh di khushboo adiye ni , 
menu teri yaad dvaundi aa,
Palkaan te kohra jamda aa ,
menu feeling teri aundi aa
Ohh sadak tere pind wali ni, 
dovan da raah padayian da,
Tera hasna nai bhul skda me , 
dil kad lenda c rahiyan da
Tu pedal hi hundi c ,
me cycle te aunda c ,
Science lab vich beh k ni tenu vekh k gaane gaunda c ,
har saal menu chaa chad janda ,
har saal menu chaa chad janda ,
jad sardi kehar kmaundi aa,
palkan te kohra jamda aa ,
menu feeling teri aundi aa,,
ik latt tere mathe nu chum k , 
thodi nu c touch krdi
kahanian varge khaab mere ,
muskaan teri c sach krdi
menu eh mehsoos hunda ,
eh dhundh nahi eh tu hi aa, 
ta hi mere rom rom nu es traah galh laundi aa ,
dhund di khushboo adiye ni, 
menu teri yaad dvaundi aa ,
palkan te kohra jamda aa ,
menu feeling teri aundi aa
ik nazar pehla hi zaalam c ,
kuj surme sun hathyaar tere ,
mere wang hi marde c tere te 2,3 yaar mere ,,
ik nu tu naah kr gayi c ,
kaiyan di himaat mar gyi c jdo menu vekh k ,
has pendi sab kehnde c tenu chaundi aa,,,

snippet.title: Mystery Of The Infants | C.I.D | सीआईडी | Real Heroes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of real heroes: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0y08jtgaKIVIYFOZ8qi-3qMLgI8sKQmY

Many people in a society chase a man. The man then goes inside one of the houses and picks up a baby. When the people get their hands on the man, they start hitting him. Two women identify the baby and Bhavish and Jyoti's daughter. When they go to their house, they are shocked to find both of them dead and the CID team is approached for further investigation. Who killed the couple? Watch this episode to find out.

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

snippet.title: GOLI MAAR DE - Rohit Zinjurke & Nita Shilimkar | Asees Kaur | Anshul Garg |Rajat Nagpal Vicky Sandhu
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Goli Maar De sung by Asees Kaur ft. Rohit Zinjurke & Nita Shilimkar.

Stream full song here

Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/goli-maar-de-2
JioSaavn: https://www.saavn.com/s/song/punjabi/Goli-Maar-De/Goli-Maar-De/AyYeUzppYAA?referrer=svn_source=share&svn_medium=com.whatsapp&utm_source=share&utm_medium=com.whatsapp
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/3jyEv2uLWWTk9K1fQuHkYT?si=XqM2bkllRxmx_ZGgt2arpA&utm_source=whatsapp
Amazon Music: https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08X4J71ZN?trackAsin=B08X4J36MM&ref=dm_sh_97ZKhC6OyKL4wWxHSxy64bBK8
Wynk Music: https://wynk.in/music/album/goli-maar-de/bl_3616553446935
Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/in/album/goli-maar-de-single/1554975645
Resso: https://m.resso.app/ZSJdh3uT9/
iTunes: https://music.apple.com/in/album/goli-maar-de-single/1554975645



Singer - Asees Kaur
Music - Rajat Nagpal
Lyrics - Vicky Sandhu
Composition- Vicky Sandhu
Recorded @ Studio 504 by Rahul Sharma Assist by Samir Dharap 
Guitars & Strokes Shomu Seal

Featuring - Rohit Zinjurke & Nita Shilimkar

Producer - Anshul Garg

Director - Rav Dhillon 
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma
Dop - Yuvraj Indori
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
chorographer - John 
Production - Kuldeep 
Editing - Zipsi 
Colour - Onkar
Stylist - Outro by Akshita & Anulika 
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital


Lyrics :

Karda rehnda a ignore ve 
Tere moohre chalda ni zor ve 
Shelian to rakhdi lukake tenu main 
Mere bina takki na koi hor ve 
Kolo d mukh fer langde eh hunde ni Asool pyar de 
Je sade vall Takkna nai channa ve sade Goli maarde 

Jini vaari tere vall Dekha sohnya 
Tera ta dhyan mere vall howe na
Odo tk tenu kuj feel hunda na 
Jado tak tere moohre kuri rowe na 
Tu Khijea Rehna a roz ve 
Kde hass meri Jind thaarde 
J sade vall Takna ..
Je sade vall Takkna nai channa ve sade Goli maarde 

Matchinga main Kardi a Jaan jaan Ke 
Jaan bujh Notice tu Krda e nai 
Mere bina rehna a tu bada  khush ve 
Tere bina Pal Mera sarda e nai 
Vicky Sandhu Main Chaluni apni Band Kar tere gere bahar de .. 
Je sade vall Takkna nai channa ve sade Goli maarde.


#GoliMaarDe #RohitZinjurke #NitaShilimkar

-----------------------------------------------
#AliPasandHaiMujhe #SyedRazaAbbasZaid #13RajabNewManqabat2021 
----------------------------------------------
Manqabat Lyrics 
-----------------------------------------

دم ھمادم علی علی علی مولا
دم ھمادم علی علی علی مولا

حیدر حیدر حیدر حیدر

جلالِ ذالجلال ھے علی علی
خدا کا ھم خیال ھےعلی علی
بلندیاں یہ  دیکھکر  پکارا دل میرا

علیؑ پسند ھے بہت پسندعلیؑ پسندھے مجھے

رجب کی تیرھویں کو یہ بتوں سےکعبہ بول اُٹھا
چلو یہاں سے جاؤ  اب  تھا  جتنا رہنا  رہ  لیا
خدا کاھے  یہ  فیصلہ علی علی
 ھے جسکا  گھر وہ آگیا علی علی
نہیں پسند مجھکو  تم  مجھے  تو  بس  میرا
علیؑ پسند ھے بہت پسندعلیؑ پسندھے مجھے

مناؤ جشن یہ کہا  خدا نے  خود  خدائی  سے
ملے ہیں آج مصطفٰےؐ زمیں پہ اپنے بھائی سے
نبیؑ کی گود میں علیؑ علی علی
 جب آئے  تو  نظر  ملی علی علی
علیؑ  جو   مسکرائے  تو  یہ   بولے    مصطفٰےؐ 
علیؑ پسند ھے بہت پسندعلیؑ پسندھے مجھے

نہ جانےکتنےلوگ تھےجو سوسکے نہ رات بھر
تھے  منتظر   بتولؑ  کا  بنے  گا  کون   ھمسفر
ستارا  عرش  سے   چلا علی علی
لئے   رضائے  فاطمہؑ علی علی
علیؑ   کے  در   پہ   آکے  یہ  ستارا  بول   اُٹھا
علیؑ پسند ھے بہت پسندعلیؑ پسندھے مجھے

مجھے پسند نہیں ھے کسی کی بات کرو
خدا کے بعد خدا کے ولی کی بات کرو
فرشتوں قبر میں کیسے سوال کیسے جواب
اب آگئے ھو تو بیٹھو علی کی بات کرو

لئے کتاب ھاتھ  میں ھر  اک  حساب   مانگنے
فرشتے  قبر  میں  جب  آگئے  جواب   مانگنے
میں مطمئن تھاساتھ علی علی
 ہیں میرےلئےنجات ہیں علی علی
فرشتے کچھ نا کہسکے  یہ میں نے  جب  کہا
علیؑ پسند ھے بہت پسندعلیؑ پسندھے مجھے

یہ  دے  رھا   تھا   دار   پر   بیان   میثمِ  ولا
علیؑ کا عشق ساتھ ھے تو جان کیا  زبان  کیا
ھے  حد میرے جنون کی علی علی
نا روک پائیگا کوئی علی علی
تو  جتنی  بار  پوچھ  لے  کہونگا   میں  سدا
علیؑ پسند ھے بہت پسندعلیؑ پسندھے مجھے

حیدر حیدر حیدر حیدر حیدر حیدر حیدر 

خیبر میں جب علیؑ کو محمدؐ نے دی صدا
سنکر  صدا  علیؑ  نے  یہ  راہوار   سے  کہا
چل اے مجلی ھمکو  بلاتے  ہیں  مصطفٰیؐ
ایسے   پہنچ  کے   تیری   مقلد   بنے   ھوا
دوڑا  وہ   اسطرح  کے   ھوا  کانپنے   لگی
کہتا  تھا  ھر  قدم   پہ  مجلی  علیؑ  علیؑ
علیؑ  علیؑ علیؑ  علیؑ

آئینگے کسطرح سے علی بس یہ سوچ کر
خیبر میں سبکے لب پہ رواں تھا اگر مگر
نظریں جمی ہوئیں تھیں مدینے کی راہ پر
کہنے   لگے   یہ حضرتِ   سلمان  دیکھکر
کیوں دیکھتے ھو راہ تم اتنے دھیان  سے
وہ  دیکھو  آرھے  ھیں  علیؑ  آسمان  سے

واہ کیا بات میرے مولا کی
واہ کیا بات میرے مولا کی
واہ کیا بات میرے مولا کی

پہنچے  علیؑ   سلام   نبیؐ   کو   کیا   ادا   
پرچم  دیا  نبیؐ   نے  چلا    شیرِ     کبریا
مرحب کو اسطرح سے پچھاڑا نہ اُٹھسکا
ھر  سمت  وردِ   نامِ   علیؑ   گونجنے  لگا
خیبر کا در اُکھاڑکے پھینکا علیؑ نے  جب
کہنے لگے یہ دیکھکے عاشق علیؑ کے سب
 
واہ کیا بات میرے مولا کی
واہ کیا بات میرے مولا کی
واہ کیا بات میرے مولا کی

من کنت مولا فہٰذا علی مولا 
من کنت مولا فہٰذا علی مولا 

علیؑ کا ھاتھ تھام کر نبیؐ نے خم میں  یہ کہا
بغور دیکھلیں سبھی یہی ھے  جانشیں  میرا
کہا  یہ جب رسول نے علی علی
ہیں سبکے مولاؑ آج سے علی علی
تو  جھوم  کر  ھر  عاشقِ  علیؑ  نے  دی  صدا
علیؑ پسند ھے بہت پسندعلیؑ پسندھے مجھے

ذیشان ھو یا رضا ھو سب ہیں تیرے درکے نوکر (مولا)
شاہ شمس سچل بھٹائی خواجہ ہوں یا ہوں قلندر
ملا ھے سبکو مرتبہ یہ سب ھے بس کرم تیرا
وہی بنا  ولی   کے  جسکے  لب  پہ   ورد  تھا

snippet.title: Lavanya Tripathi New Released Full Hindi Dubbed | South Indian Movie Dubbed in Hindi Full Movie 2021
snippet.description:
The film starts with the death of a renowned neurologist named Pramodh (R. Amarendran). His gym trainer Dheena (Sai Dheena) is seen paying respects at the funeral before leaving. The plot then shifts to a young crime inspector named Kumaran (Sundeep Kishan), who is chasing a petty thief and witnesses Dheena murdering his wife. Kumaran chases Dheena, who corners him and halts him with a blow to his head. In an ensuing tussle, Kumaran manages to kill Dheena.

A meeting with psychiatrist Aadhirai (Lavanya Tripathi) ends on a rough note when she deems him medically unfit to rejoin the police force. Later, when he faces symptoms which attribute to PTSD, he mends his ways with Aadhirai, who helps him overcome his disorder. A second murder happens in which a famous actress, Vishma (Akshara Gowda) is killed. Kumaran visits the spot and gets stressed and shocked upon finding the similar blood stains from the earlier murder and the same brand of cigarette smoked by the murderer. Aadhirai finds him, treats him for his PTSD, and makes him normal. Kumaran meets with Rudhran (Daniel Balaji) and introduces Aadhirai to him as a motivational speaker. Kumaran, now fitter, sets out his investigation and finds that a makeup man named Gopi (Mime Gopi) must have done the murder as he is the prime suspect. Upon investigation, he gets to know that Gopi and Dheena showed a totally different behavior a few days before they committed the murders. Kumaran tracks down Gopi, but he jumps to his death before confessing anything.

snippet.title: Roohi - Official Trailer | Rajkummar Janhvi  Varun | Dinesh Vijan | Mrighdeep Lamba | Hardik Mehta
snippet.description:
From the makers of Stree comes another horror comedy. Iss baar mard ko jyada dard hoga!

Roohi is set in a fictional town of North India. The film revolves around two small-town boys Bhaura and Kattanni who are stuck in a forest with Roohi. But there’s an insidious spirit following them with feet turned backwards. What will happen next? Watch the trailer to know more.

Roohi releases in cinemas on 11th March 2021. A Jio Studios Worldwide release. 

Featuring: Rajkummar Rao, Janhvi Kapoor, Varun Sharma
Directed by: Hardik Mehta
Produced by: Dinesh Vijan & Mrighdeep Singh Lamba
Music by: Sachin-Jigar

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover’s Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: CHAKRA KA RAHASYA Released Hindi Dubbed Movie | Naga Shaurya New Hindi Dubbed Movie |Mehreen Pirzada
snippet.description:
Gana (Naga Shaurya) returns to India for his sister Priya's (Sargun Kaur Luthra) marriage but is shocked to see her trying to commit suicide one night, and is shocked to learn she is pregnant but does not know who impregnated her. Gana explains this to her fiancé Ravi (Prince Cecil) who understands the situation, helps Priya get aborted, and promises to keep this a secret. Gana further convinces Priya to move on and forget about the past, which she does and happily gets married. After her marriage, Gana violently fights and interrogates men who troubled Priya in the past, only to learn none of them are behind her impregnation. Soon, another mysteriously impregnated woman named Sadhana commits suicide, and Gana reads her suicide letter explaining she didn't know how she got pregnant without her knowledge. Gana meets her parents and discovers her hospital reports according to which she fainted 3 months ago and was admitted by someone. Realizing Priya also fainted and was admitted, Gana goes to the hospital and finds out Sadhana was admitted in an emergency by an ambulance. He then learns that more girls named Lakshmi and Monica were also admitted by a similar ambulance.

The next day, Gana's girlfriend Neha (Mehreen Pirzada) informs him about her friend who fainted in the mall and was taken in an ambulance that hasn't arrived at the hospital yet. Gana rushes to the hospital and with help from the technical department, chases after the ambulances equipped with trackers. He stops many ambulances but doesn't find Neha's friend inside. Soon, he reaches a dead end and abandons his bike. Using his parkour skills, he chases after an ambulance, only to find him looking at another one that isn't being tracked. He ambushes the ambulance, fights off the men inside, and rescues Neha's friend. On the other hand, a psychopathic pathologist named Dr. Manoj Kumar (Jisshu Sengupta) is revealed to be the mastermind behind the pregnant girls, who then eliminates the fishermen. Later, Neha questions Gana's recent attitude towards her, forcing him to reveal his mission and what happened to Priya. Soon, a minister's daughter named Sowmya is killed and her corpse is dropped in front of the police station. With Neha's help, Gana manages to access Sowmya's laptop and receives photos where he spots an old man, Manoj's grandfather. Further, Gana manages to access CCTV footage of Sowmya buying a perfume from a vendor who reveals the old man told him to sell the perfumes and paid him for it. Since Sowmya was a drug addict, she wasn't unconscious despite being subject to anesthesia and thus knew about Manoj. Despite his friend's insistence not to do so, Manoj ended up killing her. Back to the present, the cops ask Manoj to perform an autopsy on Sowmya.

Gana then explains to Neha that all the victims, though unrelated, were admitted to hospital because of Hypoglycemia induced artificially by a banned drug called Hypomacene. Gana later visits the mall to view surveillance footage and discovers an address that leads him to Manoj's house. Having seen him talk about the autopsy on TV, Gana asks him for help with the case while Manoj tells him to wait for coffee. Manoj explains to his friend that he'd kill Gana, but receiving a call from Neha about the old man dumping another corpse in front of the police station, Gana secretly runs away. A car chase ensues, resulting in the old man's death after Manoj drops a cargo container on his car. Gana then goes to Manoj's house where he discovers dead bodies in separate vessels before Manoj arrives there with his friend. Manoj's friend, who turns out to be his father, removes his belt and starts beating him. It is then revealed that Manoj was psychopathic as a kid and even killed his father who since then appeared as a hallucination. Back to the present,Gana fights with Manoj and beats his head with a glass bottle. He throws him to a wardrobe and Gana drops a chandelier over him. Manoj is laughing, but when he sees his death weapon coming towards him , he faints. The chandelier falls over Manoj killing him. He then receives a call from his father who pranks him into believing a man is trying to harass Priya. Gana arrives home, and finds out Priya is now happily pregnant with Ravi's child

For More Hindi Dubbed Movies :-

Chalo (Nagashaurya) Full Movie - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y5CJhgYf-Hc&t=149s

snippet.title: Bigg Boss 14 winner Rubina Dilaik on her journey, fakeness, her relationship with Abhinav| Exclusive
snippet.description:
Bigg Boss 14 winner Rubina Dilaik in an exclusive interview with Telly Talk shares the feeling of the winning moment. She talks about her journey in the Bigg Boss 14 house where she was rejected at first but eventually reached the finale. Rubina shares her plans of using the prize money. She also talks about her husband Abhinav Shukla and her response to the people questioning them for being fake. She also reveals the reason why they decided to make the problems in their relationship public. Rubina also shares who she will be in contact with after the show. Watch the video to know more.

#RubinaDilaik #BiggBoss14 #BiggBoss14Winner

snippet.title: ‘Yeh humari pawri ho rahi hai’ कहकर Viral होने वाली लड़की कौन है? (BBC Hindi)
snippet.description:
सोशल मीडिया पर आजकल एक मीम ने काफ़ी धमाल मचाया हुआ है. इसमें एक लड़की अपने हाथ में कैमरा लिए हुए है जो पहले अपने पीछे खड़ी एक गाड़ी को दिखाती है, फिर अपने कुछ दोस्तों को दिखाती है और इसके साथ ही कुछ वाक्य बोलती है.  लड़की कहती है, "ये हमारी कार है, ये हम हैं और ये हमारी पॉरी (यानी पार्टी) हो रही है." अपने दोस्तों के साथ बनाई गई महज़ चार सेकेंड की इस आम वीडियो में जो लड़की है, वो देखते ही देखते वायरल हो गई है. उनके इस वीडियो पर लगातर मीम्स बन रहे हैं और भारत में एक संगीतकार ने उनके वीडियो को इस्तेमाल करते हुए एक 'मेशअप' गीत भी बना दिया है. 

स्टोरी: मंज़ाह अनवार, बीबीसी उर्दू 
आवाज़: मानसी दाश
वीडियो एडिटिंग: रुबाइयत बिस्वास

#PartyMeme PakistanMemeGirl 

BBC Indian Sportswoman of the Year: अपनी पसंदीदा खिलाड़ी को वोट करने के लिए क्लिक करें:  
https://bbc.in/3tIchvU

Corona Virus से जुड़े और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए यहां क्लिक करें : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=npgvIvfmNkE&list=PLYxuvEJLss6ByutcqkthikPxV3ccUkwPB

कोरोना वायरस से जुड़ी सारी प्रामाणिक ख़बरें पढ़ने के लिए क्लिक करें : https://www.bbc.com/hindi/international-51848794

ऐसे ही और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए चैनल सब्सक्राइब ज़रूर करें-
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCN7B-QD0Qgn2boVH5Q0pOWg?disable_polymer=true

es.title: Crime Patrol - Niana Bhabhi - Episodio completo | Historias de crímenes | Historias de crímenes
es.description:
Crime Patrol - Niana Bhabhi - Episodio completo | Historias de crímenes | Historias de crímenes | قصص الجريمة

Presentado por: DMR Entertainment
Historia: Rupali Rawat
DOP: Ramesh Yadav
Maquillaje y cabello: Sazid Shaikh y Shradha
Grabador de sonido: Manoj Gupta
Estilista de vestuario: Rupali Rawat
Música de fondo: Sunil Darnal
Editor: Rajiv Kumar Chanai
Directora creativa: Arya Rawat
Directora: Yatindra Rawat
Productor: Dharmanand Joshi, Raghu


Revive los mejores episodios de tu programa de suspenso y crimen favorito, Crime Patrol, Crime Series, Crime Stories, Crime Alert, Crime Time.

Sobre el programa:
--------------------------
Crímenes que nos dicen, debemos tener cuidado, debemos estar atentos. Crímenes que nos dicen que se podrían haber salvado vidas. Cada crimen que escuchamos, o nos advierte que tengamos cuidado o nos asusta, nos podría pasar. Cada crimen enciende un sentimiento, 'No debería haber sucedido'. ¿Sabría el 'por qué' detrás de un crimen, ayudaría a evitar que ocurra un crimen? ' No me gusta la forma en que me mira ',' No me gusta la forma en que se está comportando ',' Creo que está loco ',' Creo que tiene volverse loco '. Esa mirada, esa sonrisa peculiar, esa mirada persistente que desconcierta. Es difícil entender las intenciones, pero las pistas están ahí. En una casa, marido y mujer discuten, pelean. Un barco viene volando, un vaso se rompe. El esposo está enojado y la esposa molesta. Ese odio, ese ego. La distancia que sigue creciendo. Es difícil comprender el daño, pero las grietas están ahí. Sentimientos ... expresiones. Llamados del corazón incomprendidos e inciertos. Las grietas están ahí. Demasiado ancho para pasarlo por alto. Sin embargo, cuando el corazón se apodera de la mente, el resultado es una tragedia sin sentido. Crime Patrol- Dastak intentará mirar las señales, las señales que siempre están ahí antes de que se cometan estos crímenes sin sentido. Instintos / Sentimientos / Señales que tantas veces nos dicen que no todo es normal. Tal vez, esa señal / sentimiento / instinto no sea suficiente para creer que podría resultar en un crimen. Desafortunadamente, después de que se comete el crimen, esas mismas señales son inquietantes.


Descargo de responsabilidad:
Este programa es completamente una obra de ficción y un producto de la imaginación. Todos los eventos, incidencias, personajes e historia de todo el programa son completamente ficticios y no se parecen a ninguna persona viva o muerta.

د خپرونې په اړه:
--------------------------
جرمونه چې موږ ته وایی ، موږ باید محتاط واوسو ، موږ باید محتاط پاتې شو. هغه جنایتونه چې موږ ته ژوند راکوي ممکن وژغورل شي. هر جنایت چې موږ یې واورو ، یا یې موږ ته خبرداری را کوي یا ډاروي ، دا زموږ سره پیښ کیدی شي. هر جرم یو احساس راپاروي ، 'دا باید پیښ شوي نه وی'. ایا د جنایت تر شا د "ولې" په پیژندلو به د جرم له پیښیدو څخه په مخنیوي کې مرسته وکړي؟ زه هغه لاره نه خوښوم چې هغه ماته ګوري '' ، 'زه هغه طریقه نه خوښوم چې هغه / هغه سلوک کوي' ، 'زما په اند هغه / هغه د هغې له ذهن څخه بهر ده' ، "زما په اند هغه / هغې لري لیونی شو '. دا سترګې ، دا عجبه مسکا ، دا دوامداره ګړندی چې نه پوهیږي. د ارادې پوهه کول ستونزمن دي مګر اشارې یې شتون لري. په یوه کور کې میړه او میرمن بحث کوي ، جګړه کوي. یو کښتۍ الوتنه راځي ، شیشه ماته کیږي. میړه ناراض دی او ښځه خپه ده. هغه نفرت ، هغه انا. واټن چې وده کوي. د زیان پیژندل مشکل دي ، مګر درزونه شتون لري. احساسات ... څرګندونې. غلط پوهیدل ، د زړه ناڅرګنده غږونه. درزونه هلته دي ډیر هیر شوی. که څه هم کله چې زړه له ذهن څخه لاس واخلي ، پایله یې د بې پامۍ تراژیدي ده. د جرم ګزمه - ډیسک به نښو ته د کتلو هڅه وکړي ، هغه نښې چې تل د دې بې پامه جرمونو ترسره کیدو دمخه شتون لري. احساسات / احساسات / سیګنالونه چې څو ځله موږ ته وايي چې هرڅه نورمال ندي. شاید ، دا سیګنال / احساس / احساس یوازې دومره بس نه دی چې باور وکړي دا ممکن د جرم لامل شي. بدبختانه ، وروسته له هغه چې جرم ترسره شو ، نو ورته نښې نښانې ښکاري.


خبرتیا:
دا برنامه په بشپړ ډول د تخیل کار او د تصور محصول دی. د ټولې برنامې ټولې پیښې ، پیښې ، کرکټرونه او کیسې په بشپړ ډول جعلي دي او د کوم ژوندۍ یا مړه شوي انسان سره هیڅ ورته والی نلري.

शो बद्दल:
--------------------------
आम्हाला सांगणारे गुन्हे, आपण सावधगिरी बाळगणे आवश्यक आहे, सावधगिरी बाळगणे आवश्यक आहे. आम्हाला जीवन सांगणारी गुन्हेगरे जतन केली गेली असती. आपण ऐकत असलेल्या प्रत्येक गुन्ह्यामुळे एकतर सावधगिरी बाळगण्याचा इशारा देते किंवा आम्हाला भीती देते, तर आपल्या बाबतीतही हे घडते. प्रत्येक गुन्हा 'अशी घटना घडली नसावी' ही भावना जागृत करते. एखाद्या गुन्ह्यामागील 'का' माहित असेल, एखादा गुन्हा घडण्यापासून थांबविण्यात मदत करेल? ' तो माझ्याकडे ज्या पद्धतीने पहातो त्या गोष्टी मला आवडत नाहीत ',' तो / ती ज्या पद्धतीने वागतोय ते मला आवडत नाही ',' मला वाटतं तो / ती त्याच्या / तिच्या मनाच्या बाहेर आहे ',' मला वाटतं तो / ती आहे वेडा झाला '. ती टक लावून पाहणारी, ती विचित्र हसू हेतू समजणे कठीण आहे परंतु इशारे तेथे आहेत. घरात नवरा-बायको भांडतात, भांडतात. एखादे जहाज उडते, एक काच फुटतो. नवरा रागावला आहे आणि बायको अस्वस्थ आहे. तो द्वेष, तो अहंकार. अंतर वाढत राहते. नुकसान समजणे कठीण आहे, परंतु तेथे तडे आहेत. भावना… भाव. गैरसमज, हृदयातील अनिश्चित कॉलिंग. क्रॅक तेथे आहेत. खूपच जास्त चुकले. तरीही जेव्हा हृदय मनावर कब्जा करते तेव्हा त्याचा परिणाम म्हणजे एक शोकांतिका शोकांतिका आहे. गुन्हेगस्त पेट्रोल- दस्तक हे निर्बुद्ध गुन्हे घडण्यापूर्वी नेहमीच तेथे असणारी चिन्हे पाहण्याचा प्रयत्न करतील. प्रवृत्ती / भावना / सिग्नल जे वारंवार आम्हाला सांगतात की सर्व काही सामान्य नाही. कदाचित, ते सिग्नल / भावना / अंतःप्रेरणाने एखाद्या गुन्ह्यास कारणीभूत ठरू शकते यावर विश्वास ठेवणे पुरेसे नाही. दुर्दैवाने, गुन्हा झाल्यानंतर, ते समान संकेत अड्डा आहेत.


अस्वीकरण:
हा कार्यक्रम संपूर्णपणे काल्पनिक आणि कल्पनाशक्तीचे एक कार्य आहे. सर्व कार्यक्रमाची घटना, घटना, पात्र आणि कथा संपूर्णपणे काल्पनिक आहेत आणि जिवंत किंवा मेलेल्या कोणत्याही व्यक्तीशी साम्य नसतात.

hi.title: Crime Patrol - Naina Bhabhi  - Full Episode  - Crime Stories - Love Story
hi.description:
Crime Patrol - Naina Bhabhi  - Full Episode  - Crime Stories - Love Story

Presented by: DMR Entertainment
Story: Rupali Rawat
DOP: Ramesh Yadav
Makeup and Hair: Sazid Shaikh and Shradha
Sound Recordist: Manoj Gupta
Costume Stylist: Rupali Rawat
Background Music: Sunil Darnal
Editor: Rajiv Kumar Chanai
Creative Director: Arya Rawat
Director: Yatindra Rawat
Producer: Dharmanand Joshi, Raghu


Relive the best episodes of your favorite crime-thriller show, Crime Patrol, Crime Series, Crime Stories, Crime Alert, Crime Time, Crime Story

About the show:
--------------------------
Crimes that tell us, we need to be careful, we need to be watchful. Crimes that tell us lives could have been saved. Every crime we hear of, either warns us to be careful or scares us, it could happen to us. Every crime ignites a feeling, 'It should not have happened'. Would knowing the 'Why' behind a crime, help in stopping a crime from happening?' I don’t like the way he looks at me', 'I don’t like the way he/she is behaving', 'I think he/she is out of his/her mind', 'I think he/she has gone crazy'. That gaze, that quirky smile, that persistent stare which unnerves. It is difficult to understand the intentions but the hints are there. In a house a husband and wife argue, fight. A vessel comes flying, a glass breaks. The husband is angry and the wife is upset. That hatred, that ego. The distance that keeps growing. It is difficult to comprehend the damage, but the cracks are there. Feelings… expressions. Misunderstood, unresolved callings of the heart. The cracks are there. Too wide to be missed. Yet when the heart takes over the mind, the outcome is a mindless tragedy. Crime Patrol- Dastak will attempt to look at the signs, the signals that are always there before these mindless crimes are committed. Instincts/Feelings/Signals that so often tell us that not everything is normal. Maybe, that signal/feeling/instinct is just not enough to believe it could result in a crime. Unfortunately, after the crime is committed, those same signals come haunting.


Disclaimer:
This program is entirely a work of fiction and a product of imagination. All events, incidences, characters and story of all the program are entirely fictitious and bear no resemblance to any person living or dead.

Latar Belakang Muzik: Sunil Darnal
Penyunting: Rajiv Kumar Chanai
Pengarah Kreatif: Arya Rawat
Pengarah: Yatindra Rawat
Penerbit: Dharmanand Joshi, Raghu


Nikmati episod terbaik pertunjukan thriller jenayah kegemaran anda, Crime Patrol, Crime Series, Crime Stories, Crime Alert, Crime TIme

Mengenai rancangan:
--------------------------
Kejahatan yang memberitahu kita, kita perlu berhati-hati, kita perlu berwaspada. Jenayah yang memberitahu kita nyawa dapat diselamatkan. Setiap kejahatan yang kita dengar, baik memperingatkan kita untuk berhati-hati atau menakutkan kita, itu boleh berlaku pada kita. Setiap kejahatan membakar perasaan, 'Tidak seharusnya berlaku'. Adakah tahu 'mengapa' di sebalik kejahatan, membantu menghentikan jenayah daripada berlaku? ' Saya tidak suka cara dia memandang saya ',' Saya tidak suka dengan tingkah lakunya ',' Saya rasa dia sudah tidak waras ',' Saya rasa dia menjadi gila '. Pandangan itu, senyuman pelik, tatapan berterusan yang tidak perlu. Sukar untuk memahami niat tetapi petunjuknya ada. Di sebuah rumah suami isteri berdebat, bertengkar. Sebuah kapal datang terbang, kaca pecah. Suami marah dan isteri marah. Kebencian itu, ego itu. Jarak yang terus bertambah. Sukar untuk memahami kerosakan, tetapi celah-celah itu ada. Perasaan ... ungkapan. Salah faham, panggilan hati yang tidak pasti. Retakan ada. Terlalu luas untuk dilewatkan. Namun ketika hati mengambil alih fikiran, hasilnya adalah tragedi tanpa akal. Crime Patrol- Dastak akan berusaha melihat tanda-tanda, isyarat yang selalu ada sebelum jenayah tanpa akal ini dilakukan. Naluri / Perasaan / Isyarat yang sering memberitahu kita bahawa tidak semuanya normal. Mungkin, isyarat / perasaan / naluri itu tidak cukup untuk mempercayai ia boleh mengakibatkan kejahatan. Malangnya, setelah jenayah itu dilakukan, isyarat yang sama akan menghantui.


Penafian:
Program ini sepenuhnya merupakan karya fiksyen dan hasil imaginasi. Semua peristiwa, kejadian, watak dan kisah semua program adalah rekaan sepenuhnya dan tidak menyerupai mana-mana orang yang hidup atau mati.

zh.title: 犯罪巡逻-安娜（Niana Bhabhi）-整集|犯罪故事|犯罪故事| قصصالجريمة
zh.description:
犯罪巡逻-安娜（Niana Bhabhi）-整集|犯罪故事|犯罪故事| قصصالجريمة

主讲人：DMR Entertainment
故事：Rupali Rawat
DOP：Ramesh Yadav
化妆和头发：Sazid Shaikh和Shradha
录音师：Manoj Gupta
服装设计师：Rupali Rawat
背景音乐：Sunil Darnal
编辑：Rajiv Kumar Chanai
创意总监：Arya Rawat
导演：Yatindra Rawat
制片人：拉格胡（Raghu）Dharmanand Joshi


重温您喜欢的犯罪惊悚节目，犯罪巡逻，犯罪系列，犯罪故事，犯罪警报，犯罪时报的最佳剧集

关于演出：
--------------------------
告诉我们的犯罪，我们需要小心，我们必须保持警惕。告诉我们生命的犯罪本来可以保存。我们听到的每一种犯罪，要么警告我们要小心，要么吓us我们，这可能会发生在我们身上。每一种犯罪都会引起一种感觉，“它不应该发生”。知道犯罪背后的“原因”，有助于阻止犯罪发生吗？”我不喜欢他看着我的方式'，'我不喜欢他/她的行为方式'，'我认为他/她不在他/她的头脑'，'我认为他/她拥有疯了'。那凝视，那古怪的微笑，那持续的凝视使他不安。很难理解意图，但那里有提示。夫妻在房子里吵架，吵架。一艘船飞来，玻璃破裂。丈夫生气，妻子生气。那个仇恨，那个自我。不断增长的距离。很难理解破损，但是有裂缝。感觉……表情。被误解，不确定的内心呼唤。裂缝在那里。太宽了，不容错过。然而，当心脏取代思想时，结果就是一场无脑的悲剧。犯罪巡逻队-达斯塔克（Dastak）将尝试查看标志，这些标志是在犯下这些无意识犯罪之前始终存在的信号。经常告诉我们并非一切正常的本能/感觉/信号。也许，这种信号/感觉/直觉不足以相信它会导致犯罪。不幸的是，在犯罪之后，同样的信号也开始出没。


免责声明：
该程序完全是小说作品，是想象力的产物。所有程序的所有事件，事件，特征和故事都是完全虚构的，与生死攸关的人没有任何相似之处。

About the show:
--------------------------
Crimes that tell us, we need to be careful, we need to be watchful. Crimes that tell us lives could have been saved. Every crime we hear of, either warns us to be careful or scares us, it could happen to us. Every crime ignites a feeling, 'It should not have happened'. Would knowing the 'Why' behind a crime, help in stopping a crime from happening?' I don’t like the way he looks at me', 'I don’t like the way he/she is behaving', 'I think he/she is out of his/her mind', 'I think he/she has gone crazy'. That gaze, that quirky smile, that persistent stare which unnerves. It is difficult to understand the intentions but the hints are there. In a house a husband and wife argue, fight. A vessel comes flying, a glass breaks. The husband is angry and the wife is upset. That hatred, that ego. The distance that keeps growing. It is difficult to comprehend the damage, but the cracks are there. Feelings… expressions. Misunderstood, unresolved callings of the heart. The cracks are there. Too wide to be missed. Yet when the heart takes over the mind, the outcome is a mindless tragedy. Crime Patrol- Dastak will attempt to look at the signs, the signals that are always there before these mindless crimes are committed. Instincts/Feelings/Signals that so often tell us that not everything is normal. Maybe, that signal/feeling/instinct is just not enough to believe it could result in a crime. Unfortunately, after the crime is committed, those same signals come haunting.

اپنے پسندیدہ کرائم تھرلر شو ، کرائم پیٹرول ، کرائم سیریز ، کرائم اسٹوریز ، کرائم الرٹ ، کرائم TIme کی بہترین اقساط کو زندہ کریں۔

شو کے بارے میں:
--------------------------
وہ جرائم جو ہمیں بتاتے ہیں ، ہمیں محتاط رہنے کی ضرورت ہے ، ہمیں چوکس رہنے کی ضرورت ہے۔ ایسے جرائم جو ہمیں جان دیتے ہیں ان کو بچایا جاسکتا تھا۔ ہر وہ جرم جس کے بارے میں ہم سنتے ہیں ، یا تو ہمیں محتاط رہنے کا انتباہ دیتا ہے یا ہمیں ڈرا دیتا ہے ، یہ ہمارے ساتھ ہوسکتا ہے۔ ہر جرم ایک احساس کو ہوا دیتا ہے ، 'یہ نہیں ہونا چاہئے تھا'۔ کسی جرم کے پیچھے 'کیوں' جانتے ہوں گے ، جرم کو ہونے سے روکنے میں مدد کریں؟ مجھے وہ انداز نہیں لگتا جس طرح وہ میری طرف دیکھتا ہے '،' مجھے وہ طریقہ پسند نہیں ہے جس طرح وہ سلوک کررہا ہے '،' مجھے لگتا ہے کہ وہ / اس کے دماغ سے باہر ہے '،' مجھے لگتا ہے کہ وہ / اس کے پاس ہے پاگل ہو گیا ' وہ نگاہیں ، وہ عجیب مسکراہٹ ، وہ مستقل گھور. جو ناقابل تسخیر ہے۔ ارادوں کو سمجھنا مشکل ہے لیکن اشارے وہاں موجود ہیں۔ ایک گھر میں شوہر اور بیوی آپس میں جھگڑا کرتے ہیں۔ ایک برتن اڑتا ہے ، شیشہ ٹوٹ جاتا ہے۔ شوہر ناراض ہے اور بیوی پریشان ہے۔ وہ نفرت ، وہ انا۔ وہ فاصلہ جو بڑھتا ہی جاتا ہے۔ نقصان کو سمجھنا مشکل ہے ، لیکن دراڑیں وہاں ہیں۔ احساسات… اظہارات۔ غلط فہمی ، دل کی غیر یقینی کالنگیں۔ دراڑیں وہاں ہیں۔ بہت وسیع پھر بھی جب دل دماغ پر قبضہ کرلیتا ہے تو اس کا نتیجہ ایک ذہانت کا سانحہ ہوتا ہے۔ جرائم کا گشت۔دستاک ان نشانوں کو دیکھنے کی کوشش کرے گا ، جو سگنلز ہیں جو ان ذہانت انگیز جرائم کا ارتکاب کرنے سے پہلے ہمیشہ موجود رہتے ہیں۔ جبلت / احساس / سگنل جو اکثر ہمیں بتاتے ہیں کہ سب کچھ نارمل نہیں ہے۔ ہوسکتا ہے کہ ، یہ اشارہ / احساس / جبلت صرف اتنا ہی کافی نہیں ہے کہ یقین کرنے کے ل a یہ جرم کا سبب بن سکتا ہے۔ بدقسمتی سے ، جرم کے ارتکاب کے بعد ، وہی اشارے بھٹک رہے ہیں۔


دستبرداری:
یہ پروگرام مکمل طور پر تخیل کا کام ہے اور تخیل کی پیداوار ہے۔ تمام پروگرام کے واقعات ، واقعات ، کردار اور کہانی مکمل طور پر غیر حقیقی ہیں اور کسی بھی زندہ یا مردہ شخص سے کوئی مشابہت نہیں رکھتے ہیں۔

Relive the best episodes of your favorite crime-thriller show, Crime Patrol, Crime Series, Crime Stories, Crime Alert, Crime TIme

About the show:
--------------------------
Crimes that tell us, we need to be careful, we need to be watchful. Crimes that tell us lives could have been saved. Every crime we hear of, either warns us to be careful or scares us, it could happen to us. Every crime ignites a feeling, 'It should not have happened'. Would knowing the 'Why' behind a crime, help in stopping a crime from happening?' I don’t like the way he looks at me', 'I don’t like the way he/she is behaving', 'I think he/she is out of his/her mind', 'I think he/she has gone crazy'. That gaze, that quirky smile, that persistent stare which unnerves. It is difficult to understand the intentions but the hints are there. In a house a husband and wife argue, fight. A vessel comes flying, a glass breaks. The husband is angry and the wife is upset. That hatred, that ego. The distance that keeps growing. It is difficult to comprehend the damage, but the cracks are there. Feelings… expressions. Misunderstood, unresolved callings of the heart. The cracks are there. Too wide to be missed. Yet when the heart takes over the mind, the outcome is a mindless tragedy. Crime Patrol- Dastak will attempt to look at the signs, the signals that are always there before these mindless crimes are committed. Instincts/Feelings/Signals that so often tell us that not everything is normal. Maybe, that signal/feeling/instinct is just not enough to believe it could result in a crime. Unfortunately, after the crime is committed, those same signals come haunting.

Would knowing the 'Why' behind a crime, help in stopping a crime from happening?' I don’t like the way he looks at me', 'I don’t like the way he/she is behaving', 'I think he/she is out of his/her mind', 'I think he/she has gone crazy'. That gaze, that quirky smile, that persistent stare which unnerves. It is difficult to understand the intentions but the hints are there. In a house a husband and wife argue, fight. A vessel comes flying, a glass breaks. The husband is angry and the wife is upset. That hatred, that ego. The distance that keeps growing. It is difficult to comprehend the damage, but the cracks are there. Feelings… expressions. Misunderstood, unresolved callings of the heart. The cracks are there. Too wide to be missed. Yet when the heart takes over the mind, the outcome is a mindless tragedy. Crime Patrol- Dastak will attempt to look at the signs, the signals that are always there before these mindless crimes are committed. Instincts/Feelings/Signals that so often tell us that not everything is normal. Maybe, that signal/feeling/instinct is just not enough to believe it could result in a crime. Unfortunately, after the crime is committed, those same signals come haunting.


Disclaimer:
This program is entirely a work of fiction and a product of imagination. All events, incidences, characters and story of all the program are entirely fictitious and bear no resemblance to any person living or dead.

ارائه شده توسط: DMR Entertainment
داستان: روپالی روات

آرایش و مو: سازید شیخ و شرادها
صدابردار: مانوج گوپتا

ویراستار: راجیو کومار چانای
مدیر خلاقیت: آریا راوات
کارگردان: Yatindra Rawat
تهیه کننده: دارماند جوشی ، راگو


بهترین قسمت های نمایش مهیج جنایی ، گشت جنایی ، سریال های جنایی ، داستان های جنایی ، هشدار جنایی ، جرم و جنایت را از سر گذرانید

درباره نمایش:
--------------------------
جنایاتی که به ما می گویند ، ما باید مراقب باشیم ، باید مراقب باشیم. جنایاتی که به ما می گویند می توان زندگی را نجات داد. هر جنایتی که می شنویم ، یا به ما گوشزد می کند که مراقب باشیم یا ما را می ترساند ، ممکن است برای ما اتفاق بیفتد. هر جنایتی باعث ایجاد احساس می شود ، "نباید این اتفاق می افتاد". آیا می دانید "چرا" در پشت یک جرم ، به جلوگیری از وقوع جرم کمک می کند؟ " من نوع نگاه او را دوست ندارم "،" من رفتار او را دوست ندارم "،" من فکر می کنم او از ذهن خود خارج شده است "،" من فکر می کنم او دیوانه شده آن نگاه ، آن لبخند دمدمی مزاج ، و آن خیره مداوم که بی حسی می کند. درک اهداف دشوار است اما نکات موجود در آن وجود دارد. در خانه ای زن و شوهر با هم مشاجره می کنند ، دعوا کنید. یک کشتی می آید پرواز ، یک لیوان می شکند. شوهر عصبانی است و زن ناراحت. آن نفرت ، آن خودخواهی. فاصله ای که مدام در حال رشد است. درک صدمه کار دشواری است ، اما ترک ها وجود دارد. احساسات… عبارات. نداهای نامفهوم قلب ، ترک ها آنجاست. خیلی گشاد است با این وجود وقتی قلب ذهن را به دست می گیرد ، نتیجه یک فاجعه بی فکر است. گشت جنایی - دستک سعی خواهد کرد به علائم ، نشانه هایی که همیشه قبل از ارتکاب این جنایات بی فکر وجود دارد ، نگاه کند. غرایز / احساسات / سیگنال هایی که اغلب به ما می گویند همه چیز طبیعی نیست. شاید این سیگنال / احساس / غریزه فقط کافی نباشد که بتواند منجر به جرم شود. متأسفانه ، پس از ارتکاب جرم ، همان سیگنال ها آزار دهنده است.


سلب مسئولیت:
این برنامه کاملاً یک اثر داستانی و محصول تخیل است. تمام وقایع ، وقایع ، شخصیت ها و داستان همه برنامه ها کاملاً ساختگی است و هیچ شباهتی به شخص زنده یا مرده ندارد.

ta.title: குற்ற ரோந்து - நியானா பாபி - முழு அத்தியாயம் | குற்றக் கதைகள் | குற்றக் கதைகள் | قصص الجريمة
ta.description:
குற்ற ரோந்து - நியானா பாபி - முழு அத்தியாயம் | குற்றக் கதைகள் | குற்றக் கதைகள் | قصص الجريمة

வழங்கியவர்: டி.எம்.ஆர் என்டர்டெயின்மென்ட்
கதை: ரூபாலி ராவத்
டாப்: ரமேஷ் யாதவ்
ஒப்பனை மற்றும் முடி: சசித் ஷேக் மற்றும் ஷ்ரதா
ஒலி ரெக்கார்டிஸ்ட்: மனோஜ் குப்தா
ஆடை ஒப்பனையாளர்: ரூபாலி ராவத்
பின்னணி இசை: சுனில் தர்னல்
ஆசிரியர்: ராஜீவ் குமார் சனாய்
கிரியேட்டிவ் டைரக்டர்: ஆர்யா ராவத்
இயக்குனர்: யதிந்திர ராவத்
தயாரிப்பாளர்: தர்மநந்த் ஜோஷி, ரகு


உங்களுக்கு பிடித்த க்ரைம்-த்ரில்லர் ஷோ, க்ரைம் ரோந்து, க்ரைம் சீரிஸ், க்ரைம் ஸ்டோரீஸ், க்ரைம் அலர்ட், க்ரைம் டைம் ஆகியவற்றின் சிறந்த அத்தியாயங்களை மீண்டும் பெறுங்கள்

நிகழ்ச்சி பற்றி:
--------------------------
நமக்குச் சொல்லும் குற்றங்கள், நாம் கவனமாக இருக்க வேண்டும், நாம் கவனமாக இருக்க வேண்டும். உயிர்களைக் கூறும் குற்றங்கள் காப்பாற்றப்பட்டிருக்கலாம். நாம் கேட்கும் ஒவ்வொரு குற்றமும், கவனமாக இருக்கும்படி எச்சரிக்கிறது அல்லது நம்மை பயமுறுத்துகிறது, அது நமக்கு நிகழக்கூடும். ஒவ்வொரு குற்றமும் 'அது நடந்திருக்கக் கூடாது' என்ற உணர்வைத் தூண்டுகிறது. ஒரு குற்றத்தின் பின்னால் உள்ள 'ஏன்' தெரியுமா, ஒரு குற்றம் நடப்பதைத் தடுக்க உதவுமா? ' அவர் என்னைப் பார்க்கும் விதம் எனக்குப் பிடிக்கவில்லை ',' அவன் / அவள் நடந்துகொள்வது எனக்குப் பிடிக்கவில்லை ',' அவன் / அவள் அவன் / அவள் மனதில் இருந்து விலகிவிட்டதாக நான் நினைக்கிறேன் ',' அவன் / அவள் இருப்பதாக நான் நினைக்கிறேன் பைத்தியம் பிடித்தது '. அந்த விழிகள், அந்த நகைச்சுவையான புன்னகை, தொடர்ந்து பார்த்துக் கொண்டிருப்பது. நோக்கங்களைப் புரிந்துகொள்வது கடினம், ஆனால் குறிப்புகள் உள்ளன. ஒரு வீட்டில் ஒரு கணவன் மனைவி வாதிடுகிறார்கள், சண்டையிடுங்கள். ஒரு கப்பல் பறக்கிறது, ஒரு கண்ணாடி உடைகிறது. கணவருக்கு கோபம், மனைவி வருத்தப்படுகிறார்கள். அந்த வெறுப்பு, அந்த ஈகோ. வளர்ந்து கொண்டிருக்கும் தூரம். சேதத்தை புரிந்துகொள்வது கடினம், ஆனால் விரிசல்கள் உள்ளன. உணர்வுகள்… வெளிப்பாடுகள். தவறாக புரிந்து கொள்ளப்பட்ட, இதயத்தின் நிச்சயமற்ற அழைப்புகள். விரிசல்கள் உள்ளன. தவறவிட மிகவும் அகலமானது. ஆயினும்கூட இதயம் மனதைக் கைப்பற்றும்போது, ​​விளைவு ஒரு மனம் இல்லாத சோகம். குற்ற ரோந்து- தஸ்தக் அறிகுறிகளைப் பார்க்க முயற்சிக்கும், இந்த மனம் இல்லாத குற்றங்கள் செய்யப்படுவதற்கு முன்பு எப்போதும் இருக்கும் சமிக்ஞைகள். எல்லாம் இயல்பானதல்ல என்று அடிக்கடி சொல்லும் உள்ளுணர்வு / உணர்வுகள் / சமிக்ஞைகள். ஒருவேளை, அந்த சமிக்ஞை / உணர்வு / உள்ளுணர்வு ஒரு குற்றத்தை விளைவிக்கும் என்று நம்புவதற்கு மட்டும் போதாது. துரதிர்ஷ்டவசமாக, குற்றம் நடந்தபின், அதே சமிக்ஞைகள் வேட்டையாடுகின்றன.


மறுப்பு:
இந்த திட்டம் முற்றிலும் புனைகதை மற்றும் கற்பனையின் தயாரிப்பு. அனைத்து திட்டத்தின் அனைத்து நிகழ்வுகள், நிகழ்வுகள், கதாபாத்திரங்கள் மற்றும் கதை முற்றிலும் கற்பனையானவை, மேலும் வாழும் அல்லது இறந்த எந்தவொரு நபருடனும் எந்த ஒற்றுமையும் இல்லை.

மேலும் குற்றக் கதைகளுக்கு குழுசேரவும் ► tinyurl.com/yqr4dckv

Ba Mansha e Rab e Jahan Khenchtey Hain
Ali Sarhad e Kun Fukaa’n Khenchtey Hain

Ali Waqt Ki Doriyan Khenchtey Hain

Hai Jis Hath Main Murtaza Ki Sawari
Usi Se Abuzar Jahan Khenchtey Hain

Yeh Ale Muhammad Hain Ale Muhammad
Jo Sajdon’n Say Haq Kay Nishaan Khenchtey Hain

Likho Nooh Tum Panch Isme Ilahi
Farishtey Abhi BadBaa’n Khenchtey Hain

Yeh Sajdo’n Main Sher e Khuda Ki Kashish Hai
Makaa’n Sey Suwe La Makaa’n Khenchtey Hain

Yah Khaki  Bashar Farsh e Aza Bicha Kar
Zameen Ki Taraf Asmaan Khenchtey Hain

Nuseri Muqasir Rahai Apni Had Main
Woh Mola Ko Kyun Darmiyaan Khenchtey Hain

Takallum Khuda e Sukhan kay Kalam Say
Jabee’n e Imam e Zamaan Khenchtey Hain

snippet.title: Kuruluş Osman 46. Bölüm
snippet.description:
46.Bölüm:
TARGUN KAÇMAYI BAŞARIYOR

Peşinde olduğu emanetleri eline geçiren ve Bala, Hazal, Lena hatunlarla birlikte Dündar Bey’i esir alan Targun; Kayı Obası’ndan kaçmayı başarır. Nikola’nın tuzağına düşen ve Bamsı Bey’le birlikte ölüm kalım savaşı veren Osman Bey, Malhun Hatun’un sürpriz desteği ile Bizans saldırısını savuşturur. Flatyos ve askerlerinin tuzağına düşen Savcı Bey ve oğlu Bayhoca ise son gücüyle direnmektedir.

MALHUN HATUN PLANLARI ALT ÜST EDİYOR
Türk kağanlarından gelen emanetlerin Targun’un eline geçmesi büyük şok yaratırken; Osman Bey emanetleri geri almak ve Bala Hatun başta olmak üzere tüm esirleri kurtarmak için zekice bir plan kurar. Malhun Hatun ve alplerinin desteği ise Nikola’nın planlarını değiştirmesine neden olacaktır.

NİKOLA’NIN YENİ PLANI NE OLACAK?
Malhun Hatun’un gelişi ve Osman Bey’e desteği dengeleri nasıl değiştirecek? Osman Bey, Bala Hatun’u ve esirleri kurtarmak için ne yapacak? Türk kağanlarının emanetlerini ele geçiren Targun, elindeki kozu nasıl kullanacak? Planları sekteye uğrayan Nikola nasıl pozisyon alacak? Savcı Bey ve Bayhoca’nın akıbeti ne olacak? Dündar Bey’in planı başarıya ulaşacak mı? Göktuğ, Targun’a engel olabilecek mi?

O, kömür karası gözleriyle, gaza ve hürriyet ateşini tutuşturacaktı. 

Adı, Ertuğrul Gazi oğlu Osman’dı… 

Karanlığın içinde ona yol gösteren “aşk” oldu…

Kan ve gözyaşıyla sulanan topraklarda, gök ekini gibi biçilen; yedi göğü, yedi yeri, dağları, denizleri aşacak bir milletin rüyasını “aşkla” gördü.

Gücünü kılıcından değil, “aşktan” aldı… Zorbalığa adaletle; köleliğe hürriyetle direnen, tarihin gördüğü en büyük imparatorluğa adını “aşkla” verdi.

72 milleti kıran bozuk düzene karşı başkaldırı, mazlumların sessiz çığlığına umut, Kuruluş’un adı oldu…

Kuruluş Osman… 400 çadırlık bir obadan, “ilahi aşkla” kurulan bir cihan imparatorluğuna yürüyüşün hikayesi.

Abone Olmak için ; https://bit.ly/2t8pQdU

atv Resmi YouTube Kanalına Abone Olmak İçin; https://goo.gl/dmrDLN

snippet.title: चॉकलेट के शौक़ीन चुनौती #2 Multi DO Challenge
snippet.description:
मम्म चॉकलेट, मेरी पसंदीदा, इतनी स्वादिष्ट! यदि तुम भूल गयी हो तो ,तुम अकेली  नहीं हो , यह मेरे लिए भी है! ओह सच में? इसे लो! आह्ह, क्या ???? आप चॉकलेट सही चाहते थे? तुम बस सूसी का इंतजार करो, मैं तुम्हें वापस लाऊंगा! आइए देखें कि आप इस चॉकलेट चैलेंज में किस तरह से उचित हैं, मैंने इसकी व्यवस्था की है!

क्या आपको एक या उससे ज़्यादा फायदेमंद लगे ये बहुत बढ़िया भाड़े? याद से इस धन को दोस्तों से बांटें इस वीडियो को शेयर कर के! और ऐसे और फायदेमंद हैक्स के लिए यू ट्यूब  चैनल Multi DO को सब्सक्राइब करना ना भूलें!


#funny #MultiDO #DIY

क्या आपको एक या उससे ज़्यादा फायदेमंद लगे ये बहुत बढ़िया भाड़े? याद से इस धन को दोस्तों से बांटें इस वीडियो को शेयर कर के! और ऐसे और फायदेमंद हैक्स के लिए यू ट्यूब  चैनल Multi DO को सब्सक्राइब करना ना भूलें!


#funny #MultiDO #DIY

snippet.title: Khoobsurat Itni Moti Kaisay Hogai - Nabeel | Bulbulay
snippet.description:
Download  ARY ZAP APP :https://l.ead.me/bb9zI1

‘Bulbulay‘ is about a quick witted, slapstick comedy that revolves around a family of four. Each episode is filled with humorous quirks that drives the viewer in a frenzy of laughter. Momo, Nabeel, Khoobsurat and Mehmood Sahib, find themselves in a new situation every time and deal with the consequences in their own unique manner.

Written by: Ali Imran

Directed by: Rana Rizwan

Cast:

Nabeel,
Ayesha Omar,
Hina Dilpazeer,
Mehmood Aslam.

#AyeshaOmar #Momo #Bulbulay

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn’t an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone’s favorite activity, but it can be very messy — and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one’s outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won’t take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 — The pacifier hack 

2:42 — A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 — The getting along/best friends’ shirt

localized.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
localized.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn’t an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone’s favorite activity, but it can be very messy — and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one’s outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won’t take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know.

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman’s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT
Like HBO Max on Facebook: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxFacebook

snippet.title: Sona Lagda (Official Video) Sukriti, Prakriti, Sukhe | Bharatt-Saurabh | Satti Dhillon | New Song
snippet.description:
To celebrate the season of love VYRL Originals brings to you a Valentines special - Sona Lagda sung by the multi-talented twin sisters Sukriti - Prakriti collaborating for the very first time with the hitmaker Sukh-E Muzical Doctorz. This peppy dance song has been co-composed and written by Bharatt-Saurabh and Sukh-E and the music video has been directed by the popular Satti Dhillon. The melodic drop and vibrant music video is sure to get your foot tapping. Are you ready for this banger?

#SukritiPrakriti #SukhE #SonaLagda

snippet.title: Kaabil Full Hindi Movie | Hritik Roshan & Yami Gautam New Bollywood HD Movies 2021 | New Hindi Films
snippet.description:
Kaabil (transl. Capable) is a 2017 Indian Hindi-language action thriller film[7][8] directed by Sanjay Gupta, written by Vijay Kumar Mishra, produced by Rakesh Roshan under his banner FilmKraft Productions.[9] It stars Hrithik Roshan, Yami Gautam, Ronit Roy and Rohit Roy. The music was composed by Rajesh Roshan. Principal photography of the film began on 30 March 2016.[10]

The film follows a blind voiceover artist who becomes disillusioned when his wife is raped and the perpetrators walk free. He becomes a vigilante and decides to seek revenge against those responsible for his wife's death, while also dodging police with a cover that no one would believe a blind man can kill someone.

Kaabil was released theatrically on 25 January 2017.[11][12] Roshan received the Nomination of Filmfare Award for Best Actor for his performance at the 63rd Filmfare Awards. In 2019, it was also released in China where it became commercially unsuccessful.[13]

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Ep 3104 - Full Episode - 17th February, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chasmah Episodes: https://youtube.com/channel/UC54_ux4BnaJwkVFn5M391XQ?sub_confirmation=1

Episode 3104: 
-----------------------
Bhide calls Jethalal and informs him that they have succeeded in Mision Bhogilal and call Jethalal to Bhogilal's office. Bhogilal asks Bhide about what's going on and then Bhide reveals the truth and tells him that they are Jethalal's friends. Sodhi gets angry at Bhogilal and decides to teach him a lesson. Catch the fun and watch the full episode.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Oondha Chashma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in ""Gokuldham Co-operative Society"" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around Jethalal (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Tarak Mehta (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. Jethalal finds a friend and philosopher in Tarak Mehta and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalal's family includes his simpleton wife Daya Ben (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son Tapu (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members residing in the Gokuldham Society. They have often warned Jethalal to reform Tapu or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
We’ve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and here’s what we created. Aren’t 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, let’s try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts you’ll adore. 

Timestamps: 

1:06 — How to fix a broken wood piece 

2:25 — DIY ring 

2:48 — Beautiful, DIY jewelry holder 

4:15 — DIY hair comb 

6:53 — Cute DIY earrings 

9:03 — DIY fake nails

Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. snippet.title: Raqs-e-Bismil | Episode 7 | HUM TV Drama | 5 Feb 2021
snippet.description:
Raqs-e-Bismil, Episode 7, Official HD Video - 5 February 2021

Written by Hashim Nadeem, "Raqs-e-Bismil" marks the television return of ace director Wajahat Rauf and features the versatile Imran Ashraf in yet another distinct avatar opposite the uber talented Sarah Khan. Produced jointly by Shazia Wajahat and MD Productions, "Raqs-e-Bismil" is an unconventional take on love and passion. The story of the play revolves around two characters from contrasting worlds and ideologies and their understandings of love, life and relations. Apart from offering an exciting lead pair, the serial boasts a stellar supporting cast such as Mehmood Aslam, Nida Mumtaz, Anoushay Abbasi, Momin Saqib, Javeria Abbasi, Gul E Rana, Saleem Mairaj, Rashid Farooqui, Furqan Qureshi, Sajid Shah, Shazia Qaiser and others, and also marks the television debut of Lollywood diva Zara Sheikh. 

Staring: 
Imran Ashraf, Sarah Khan, Mehmood Aslam, Nida Mumtaz, Anoushay Abbasi, Momin Saqib, Javeria Abbasi, Gul E Rana, Saleem Mairaj, Rashid Farooqui, Mohammad Faisal Imran, Zara Shaikh, Azeem Sajjad, Furqan Qureshi, Sajid Shah, Shazia Qaiser, Farah Nadir, Tahir Jatoi, Shahzad Mukhtar, Faria Hassan, Benazir Khan, Taha Humayun, Abu Rohan, Umer Alam, Farrukh Darbaar & Others.

Written by: Hashim Nadeem

Directed by: Wajahat Rauf﻿

#RaqseBismil #HUMTV #ImranAshraf #SarahKhan #MahmoodAslam #ZaraSheikh #AnousheyAbbassi #MDProductions

ur.title: Raqs-e-Bismil | Episode 7 | HUM TV Drama | 5 Feb 2021
ur.description:
Raqs-e-Bismil, Episode 7, Official HD Video - 5 February 2021

Written by Hashim Nadeem, "Raqs-e-Bismil" marks the television return of ace director Wajahat Rauf and features the versatile Imran Ashraf in yet another distinct avatar opposite the uber talented Sarah Khan. Produced jointly by Shazia Wajahat and MD Productions, "Raqs-e-Bismil" is an unconventional take on love and passion. The story of the play revolves around two characters from contrasting worlds and ideologies and their understandings of love, life and relations. Apart from offering an exciting lead pair, the serial boasts a stellar supporting cast such as Mehmood Aslam, Nida Mumtaz, Anoushay Abbasi, Momin Saqib, Javeria Abbasi, Gul E Rana, Saleem Mairaj, Rashid Farooqui, Furqan Qureshi, Sajid Shah, Shazia Qaiser and others, and also marks the television debut of Lollywood diva Zara Sheikh. 

Staring: 
Imran Ashraf, Sarah Khan, Mehmood Aslam, Nida Mumtaz, Anoushay Abbasi, Momin Saqib, Javeria Abbasi, Gul E Rana, Saleem Mairaj, Rashid Farooqui, Mohammad Faisal Imran, Zara Shaikh, Azeem Sajjad, Furqan Qureshi, Sajid Shah, Shazia Qaiser, Farah Nadir, Tahir Jatoi, Shahzad Mukhtar, Faria Hassan, Benazir Khan, Taha Humayun, Abu Rohan, Umer Alam, Farrukh Darbaar & Others.

Written by: Hashim Nadeem

Directed by: Wajahat Rauf﻿

#RaqseBismil #HUMTV #ImranAshraf #SarahKhan #MahmoodAslam #ZaraSheikh #AnousheyAbbassi #MDProductions

snippet.title: Press Release No 24/2021, Pak Conducted Successful Launch of Babur Cruise Missile -11 Feb 2021(ISPR)
snippet.description:
ISPR 
Pakistan today conducted a successful Training Launch of Babur Cruise Missile IA, with a range of 450 kilometers. Babur Cruise Missile is capable of engaging targets at Land and Sea with high precision. The missile was launched from a state of the art Multi Tube Missile Launch Vehicle. 
 The Training Launch was witnessed by Dr Raza Samar, Chairman NESCOM, Lieutenant General Muhammad Ali, Commander Army Strategic Forces Command, senior officers of Strategic Plans Division, Army Strategic Forces Command, Scientists and Engineers of the strategic organizations.
 Chairman NESCOM appreciated the standard of training and operational preparedness of Army Strategic Forces, which was reflected by the proficient handling of the Weapon System in the field and fulfillment of all laid down training parameters. He also appreciated the contributions of scientists and engineers towards enhancement of Pakistan’s strategic capability.   
 The President, Prime Minister of Pakistan, Chairman Joint Chiefs of Staff Committee and Services Chiefs have also congratulated the participating troops on conduct of successful training launch.
